import pytest
from unittest.mock import patch, MagicMock
from myapp.service import OrderProcessor

@patch("myapp.service.send_email")
@patch("myapp.service.charge_payment")
@patch("myapp.service.reserve_inventory")
@patch("myapp.service.validate_address")
@patch("myapp.service.lookup_customer")
@patch("myapp.service.get_tax_rate")
def test_process_order_full(mock_tax, mock_customer, mock_address,
                            mock_inventory, mock_payment, mock_email):
    mock_tax.return_value = 0.08
    mock_customer.return_value = {"id": "C1", "name": "Alice"}
    mock_address.return_value = {"valid": True, "zip": "90210"}
    mock_inventory.return_value = True
    mock_payment.return_value = {"txn_id": "TXN-1", "status": "ok"}
    mock_email.return_value = True

    processor = OrderProcessor()
    result = processor.process({"item": "widget", "qty": 1})
    assert result["status"] == "completed"

@patch("myapp.service.cache_get")
@patch("myapp.service.cache_set")
@patch("myapp.service.db_query")
@patch("myapp.service.db_execute")
@patch("myapp.service.log_metric")
@patch("myapp.service.notify_admin")
def test_sync_inventory(mock_notify, mock_metric, mock_exec,
                        mock_query, mock_set, mock_get):
    mock_get.return_value = None
    mock_query.return_value = [{"sku": "A1", "qty": 10}]
    mock_exec.return_value = True
    mock_set.return_value = True
    mock_notify.return_value = True
    mock_metric.return_value = None

    processor = OrderProcessor()
    result = processor.sync_inventory()
    assert result["synced"] == 1
